title: NIfTI Phantom v1
description: Numerical MRI simulation phantom. Can contain segmented multi-tissue data as well as per-voxel data. References NIfTI files stored next to this file.

$schema.description: Format discriminator and version. Any URI whose path ends in 'nifti-phantom-v1', optionally followed by a file extension (e.g. '.json', '.schema.json'), so files can point at the schema via any host, branch or tag.

units.description: Units used by tissue properties. To simplify parsers, the exact units are fixed - the purpose of this field is documentation.

system.description: Global scalar parameters of the (virtual) MR system, shared by all tissues.

gyro.description: Gyromagnetic ratio of the simulation data in MHz / T - use 42.5764 for water

B0.description: Main magnetic field strength in T this simulation data was captured for.

reslice_to.description: Optional target sampling grid. If omitted, NIfTIs are loaded as-is. If given, all NIfTIs are resampled onto the grid defined by `affine` and `resolution` (interpreted exactly as in the NIfTI standard). This only changes how the data is sampled, not the orientation of the phantom.

affine.description: Voxel-to-world affine: the upper 3 rows of the 4x4 NIfTI affine (the implicit 4th row is [0, 0, 0, 1]), as 3 rows of 4 numbers each.

resolution.description: Target matrix size (voxel counts) along the 3 spatial axes.

tissues.description: List of tissues for this phantom. Keys can be used for identification (e.g.: 'gm', 'wm', 'csf') but are otherwise arbitrary.

tissue.description: A single tissue, defined by its spatial distribution (NIfTI) and its physical properties. Only the properties listed here are allowed; any omitted property takes its documented default.

density.description: Spatial distribution / volume fraction of this tissue. Must be spatially resolved (a NIfTI reference).

T1.description: Longitudinal relaxation time [s]. Defaults to infinity (no relaxation) when omitted.

T2.description: Transversal relaxation time [s]. Defaults to infinity (no relaxation) when omitted.

T2'.description: Reversible transversal relaxation time [s]. Defaults to infinity (no relaxation) when omitted.

ADC.description: Apparent diffusion coefficient [10^-3 mm^2/s]. Defaults to 0 when omitted.

dB0.description: Off-resonance / B0 deviation [Hz]. Defaults to 0 when omitted.

B1+.description: B1 transmit field [rel], one entry per transmit channel. Defaults to [1] when omitted.

B1-.description: B1 receive field [rel], one entry per receive channel. Defaults to [1] when omitted.

scalarOrMap.description: A single property value: either a spatially-uniform number, or a spatial map backed by a NIfTI sub-volume (optionally transformed).

niftiReference.description: Reference to a single sub-volume of a NIfTI file, selected by zero-based index (4th-dimension of file) in square brackets, e.g. "subj42.nii.gz[0]".

transformedReference.description: A NIfTI reference whose voxel values are remapped by an expression of `x` (the voxel value), e.g. {"file": "subj42_dB0.nii.gz[0]", "func": "x - 420"}.

func.description: Per-voxel remap expression of the voxel value `x`. Allowed tokens: numbers (integer, decimal, leading-dot, or scientific notation, e.g. 420, 1.5, .5, 1e-3), the operators + - * /, parentheses, and the variables x, x_min, x_max, x_std, x_mean (per-volume statistics of x).
